feat.name: The Harder They Fall (Rogue)
feat.text: You make your foes fall painfully when you trip them. When you successfully Trip an off-guard foe, your target takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage. On a critical success, the target takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage plus your sneak attack damage.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.
